name: Vertiv Holdings Co

investment_theses.company_type: Critical Digital Infrastructure / Power Management for Data Centers

content: Vertiv Holdings Co is a global provider of critical digital infrastructure and continuity solutions. The company designs, manufactures, and services technologies that support data centers, communication networks, and commercial and industrial environments. Its comprehensive portfolio includes power management, thermal management, and IT management solutions, as well as services and software to optimize the performance and reliability of vital applications. Vertiv plays a crucial role in enabling the growth of cloud computing, edge computing, and the increasing demand for high-performance computing driven by artificial intelligence.
